meta.title: From GHOST to TRAIN
meta.message: [Ghost Train Orchestra](https://www.ghosttrainorchestra.com/) played two captivating sets of Moondog compositions, with a rotating cast of guests including David Byrne and Joan As Police Woman. Moondog was a blind composer who was a staple on the streets of Manhattan in the mid-century, often found dressed in a cloak and a horned helmet. He invented his own instruments, and became a formative influence on everyone from Charlie Parker to Philip Glass.

ladder.clue: Change one letter in <> to embrace
Drop the last letter from <> and anagram to get an organ
Change one letter in <> to get a method of transport
